cause_record_has_effect_stem.stem: The religious motivation reflected in the invocation that opens the excerpt contributed most directly to which of the following?
The monetary policy debate that gave rise to Bryan's speech was contributed to most directly by which of the following?
The concern for American security that Roosevelt expresses in the excerpt contributed most directly to which of the following developments?
The emphasis on a 'celebration of freedom' and global renewal that pervades Kennedy's 1961 inaugural address contributed most directly to which of the following?
The peaceful transfer of executive power reflected in Jefferson's 1801 inaugural address contributed most directly to which of the following?
The confident belief that the United States is 'destined to be the great nation of futurity' contributed most directly to which contemporaneous development?
The author's declaration that 'our national birth was the beginning of a new history' contributed most directly to which cultural development of the antebellum period?
The author's observation that 'the American people having derived their origin from many other nations' contributed most directly to which of the following that shaped his outlook?

effect_contemporaneous_needs_review.stem: The agreement referenced in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following developments in the Plymouth Colony?

The advocacy expressed in Bryan's speech most immediately led to which of the following developments in the 1896 presidential election?
The passage of the legislation excerpted above most immediately led to which of the following developments?
The exclusion enacted in the excerpt most immediately contributed to which of the following social developments among Chinese immigrants already in the United States?

effect_answer_not_explicitly_later.stem: The tradition established by the document in the excerpt most directly contributed to which later characteristic of colonial New England?

Truman's assertion of American responsibility for global affairs, as expressed in this address, most directly contributed to which later characteristic of U.S. foreign policy?
The expanded federal role in local 'civic betterment' celebrated in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following developments?
